name.title: Name your workspace
name.description: Workspaces keep your agents organized, one for personal, one for work, etc.

provider.title: Connect your AI
provider.description: Houston uses <emph>your own</emph> subscription. We never see your credentials.

migrationReconnect.title: Welcome back
migrationReconnect.body: Your assistants and everything you've worked on are right here. Just reconnect your AI to pick up where you left off.
migrationReconnect.dismissError: We couldn't save that. Please try again.

errors.setupFailed: We couldn't finish setting up your workspace. Please try again.
errors.title: Setup didn't finish
errors.body: Something went wrong while creating your assistant. Try again, or go back and pick a different AI.

defaults.focus: Help me stay organized, prepare my day, draft messages, protect focus time, and keep track of follow-ups.
defaults.approvalRule: Ask before sending messages, creating calendar events, or changing anything in connected apps.

meetingPrep.name: Meeting prep
meetingPrep.description: Pull together everything you need before your next meeting: who is on the call, what you last discussed, and anything time-sensitive, from your inbox and a quick web check, handed to you before it starts.

connect.title: Connect your AI
connect.body: Choose the AI you already pay for and sign in. You bring your own subscription, so Houston never sees your password or your bill.

email.title: See your agent in action
email.body: Your agent will send a real email to you, so you can watch it work.
email.skipHint: Your agent finished but didn't confirm. You can skip and start using Houston.

aiConnected.title: Your AI is connected!
aiConnected.body: Your agent can think now. You're one step closer.

connectEmail.title: Give your agent access to your email
connectEmail.body: Pick your email so your agent can send on your behalf. You connect it once, securely.
connectEmail.skipHint: Can't connect right now? You can do this anytime from Integrations.
connectEmail.skipConfirmBody: You can connect it anytime from Integrations. Your agent won't be able to send or read email until you do.

emailConnected.title: Email connected!
emailConnected.body: That's how easy connecting an app is, and your agent can reach 1000+ this way.

finished.title: You're all set!
finished.body: Your Personal Assistant just proved it can act for you, for real.
finished.readyBody: Your Personal Assistant is ready to get to work for you.
finished.inviteTeamBody: See who's working on every mission. Create a team and share your agents.
